payload.notes: Start with the global prerequisites (tsconfig + @types/node) then move to packet 01 treebuilder cleanup per justshtml/PROMPT.md.

changes: Add explicit ModeHandlerResult return annotations for handleTagInBody, handleEofInBody, modeInBody, modeInTemplate, modeFallbackToBody, and related helpers so the mutual recursion stops inferring any.

Solidify FragmentContext fields and _parse_error/tag_name types to keep null/never flows explicit across the treebuilder helper stack.

payload.details: type Node namespace nullable, annotate mode handlers and helpers, and tighten attribute maps/elementInScope signatures per packet-01-treebuilder-part1 before rerunning npx tsc --noEmit

Per PROMPT, tighten the treebuilder typings: ModeHandler helpers (modeInBody/modeInTemplate/fallback/EOF) should return ModeHandlerResult, FragmentContext needs typed namespace fields, _parse_error tag_name should allow string|null, attribute helpers (_prepare_foreign_attributes, _adjust_attributes, _node_attribute_value, etc.) must use AttributeMap/Record<string,string|null> to avoid implicit any, and element-in-scope helpers should cover both Set and string overloads while respecting null namespaces.
